title: GFluffy Tunisian Plant-Based-Friendly Tagine
description: A rich and fluffy monsoon-inspired dish from Tunisia, featuring a tamarind paste base that is cooked in a clay pot with a copper vessel for added depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Vegetables (Optional, such as bell peppers and carrots)

instructions: Add tamarind paste to a large pot with water.
Bring the mixture to a boil then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
In another pot, mix almond flour with honey until smooth.
Combine tamarind mixture with the almond-honey sauce.
Simmer together until the consistency is thick and creamy.
Add cooked chickpeas and rice to the tagine, mixing well.
Garnish with fresh herbs or sliced vegetables if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
